logic.Tbet: OR(AND(NOT(STAT1), Tbet), AND(STAT1, NOT(Tbet), AP1, NFAT1, NFKB, LEQ(Blimp1, 1), LEQ(RUNX1, 1)), AND(STAT1, Tbet))
logic.IFNg: AND(STAT1, Tbet, STAT4, AP1, NFAT1, RUNX3, EOMES)
logic.STAT3: OR(AND(NOT(IL1R), AP1, NFKB, NOT(IL23R), IL6R), AND(NOT(IL1R), AP1, NFKB, IL23R), AND(IL1R, AP1, NFKB))
logic.IL17A: OR(AND(STAT3, RORGt, AP1, IRF4, AHR, EQ(NFAT2A, 2), LEQ(STAT5B, 1), SMAD2, RORA), AND(STAT3, RORGt, AP1, IRF4, AHR, EQ(NFAT2A, 2), EQ(STAT5B, 2), SMAD2, LEQ(STAT5A, 1), RORA))
logic.IL17F: OR(AND(NOT(STAT1), STAT3, RORGt, AP1, NFAT1, EQ(Blimp1, 2), IRF4, AHR, LEQ(STAT5B, 1)), AND(NOT(STAT1), STAT3, RORGt, AP1, NFAT1, EQ(Blimp1, 2), IRF4, AHR, EQ(STAT5B, 2), LEQ(STAT5A, 1)), AND(STAT1, RORGt, AP1, NFAT1, EQ(Blimp1, 2), IRF4, AHR, LEQ(STAT5B, 1)), AND(STAT1, RORGt, AP1, NFAT1, EQ(Blimp1, 2), IRF4, AHR, EQ(STAT5B, 2), LEQ(STAT5A, 1)))
logic.RORGt: OR(AND(NOT(Tbet), NOT(STAT3), AP1, NFAT1, IRF4, RUNX1), AND(NOT(Tbet), STAT3, RUNX1), AND(Tbet, STAT3, RUNX1))
logic.NFAT2A: OR(AND(NFAT1, NOT(NFAT2), NFAT4, LEQ(NFAT2A, 1), NOT(FOXP3), ITK), AND(NFAT1, NFAT2, LEQ(NFAT2A, 1), NOT(FOXP3), ITK))
logic.FOXP3: OR(AND(NOT(STAT1), NOT(RORGt), NOT(NFAT1), FOXP3), AND(NOT(STAT1), NOT(RORGt), NFAT1, NOT(FOXP3), EQ(STAT5B, 2), SMAD2), AND(NOT(STAT1), NOT(RORGt), NFAT1, FOXP3), AND(NOT(STAT1), RORGt, FOXP3), AND(STAT1, FOXP3))
logic.IL2RA: OR(AND(NFKB, NFAT2A, NOT(FOXP3), STAT5B, NOT(SATB1)), AND(NFKB, NFAT2A, FOXP3, NOT(STAT5B), SMAD2, NOT(SATB1)), AND(NFKB, NFAT2A, FOXP3, STAT5B, NOT(SATB1)))
logic.STAT5A: OR(AND(NOT(IL12R), IL1R, IL2R), AND(IL12R, NOT(IL1R), IL2R))
logic.IL23R: OR(AND(NOT(IL23_In), STAT3, RORGt, Myd88), AND(IL23_In, NOT(IL12RB1), STAT3, RORGt, Myd88), AND(IL23_In, IL12RB1, STAT3, RORGt, NOT(Myd88), GP130), AND(IL23_In, IL12RB1, STAT3, RORGt, Myd88))
